testsuite.name: RESEARCHMANTRA_AUTOMATION.AUTOMATION.Profile_And_Settings_Tests

testcase.name: testProfileAndSettingsFlow

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Update (tried for 12 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval)

======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLoginScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7661935544 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> OTP UI Elements missing or took too long to load. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Expected toast containing 'Invalid' did not appear or vanished too quickly. -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 465560 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Waiting 4 seconds for Dashboard/Registration routing... -> Checking routing destination... -> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow... -> Entering Data: vamshi krishna | vamshikrishna101@test.com | Delhi -> Testing Gender Radio Buttons (Male -> Female)... -> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female. -> Preparing to click Register... -> Submitting Registration Form... -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: vamshi krishna -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testLoginScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 132.703 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDashboardCompleteFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Dashboard Verification... -> Step 1: Checking User Profile Name in Header. -> Profile Name verified in header: vamshi krishna -> Step 2: Checking Notification Bell & Tabs. -> Clicked Notification Bell successfully. -> Successfully interacted with all Notification tabs. -> Returned to Dashboard from Notifications. -> Step 3: Deep Clicking Core Trade Category Cards. -> Testing Routing for: MCX Positional -> ❌ Routing failed for: MCX Positional -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testDashboardCompleteFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 10.778 SECONDS.

'Activate Now' lock screen is correctly displayed. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab (Free Access). -> ✅ Live Commentary feed loaded with free access data. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: MCX Positional (Free Access) -> ✅ Closed Trades (Booked Trades) loaded with free access data. -> ✅ Full verification complete for: MCX Positional -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: Nifty Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: Nifty Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab (Subscription Logic). -> 🔒 Product [Nifty Positional] is NOT PURCHASED.
